hero.name: TELE NANDINI
hero.tagline: Aspiring Software Engineer | Python Developer | Full Stack Learner

about.summary: Motivated Computer Science undergraduate with a strong interest in software development, Python programming, and full stack web technologies. Hands-on experience through academic projects and hackathons, with a focus on building practical solutions using problem-solving skills. Actively seeking entry-level or internship opportunities to grow as a software engineer.
